---
title: "Research artifacts"
description: >-
  Interactive 3D models, animations, and visualizations of the A=1
  Discrete Causal Lattice substrate — the bipartite octahedral lattice
  behind the framework's discrete-spacetime physics.
listing:
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

Interactive and visual artifacts from the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice
series — 3D models of the lattice substrate, animations of Arnold-
tongue lock-in / unlock dynamics, and standalone visualizations that
don't fit cleanly inside a paper figure.

Each artifact lists its provenance (which paper or experiment script
produced it) and provides a viewer or download link.
